name: polished steel
notes: Add micro-scratch roughness map for realism. Mirror-like. Colored reflections come from environment.

name: brushed steel
notes: Anisotropic roughness if DCC supports. Directional grain via roughness map.

name: raw iron
notes: Matte metallic. No reflections visible.

name: rusted iron
notes: Metallic mask (metallic=1 under clean metal, =0 over rust). Color shifts orange-brown.

name: gold
notes: Colored reflections from metallic base color. Not a coating - it IS the metal.

name: copper
notes: Patina via roughness + color mask. Greenish patina = metallic 0, roughness 0.8, green tint.

name: glossy plastic
notes: IOR Level ~0.5 in Blender 4.x Principled. Hard edge highlights.

name: matte plastic
notes: Soft diffuse with subtle sheen. No sharp highlights.

name: rubber
notes: Very rough. Almost no specular. Black or very dark.

name: dry raw wood oak
notes: Grain via normal map. Slight variation in base color for realism.

name: lacquered wood
notes: Clear-coat extension (KHR_materials_clearcoat) for top gloss layer.

name: concrete rough
notes: Cavity AO in ORM R-channel. Normal map for surface texture.

name: painted metal
notes: Chips = metallic mask (scratches expose metal = metallic 1.0). Normal map for surface.

name: glass transparent
notes: Transmission=1.0; IOR=1.45. glTF: KHR_materials_transmission + KHR_materials_ior.

name: glass frosted
notes: Transmission=0.8-0.9 + higher roughness scatters refraction.

name: emissive led panel
notes: Emission Strength 5-20 in Blender. glTF KHR_materials_emissive_strength. HDR render.

name: human skin
notes: Subsurface baked to base color for glTF (no native SSS). Fine pore detail via normal map.

name: fabric velvet
notes: KHR_materials_sheen extension for glTF. High roughness. Sheen color = bright version of base.

name: ceramic glazed
notes: Similar to lacquered wood. IOR ~1.55.

name: stone marble
notes: Veins via base color texture. Moderate roughness. AO in cavities.
